title: JobTracker and TaskTracker Configuration
description: The 'server/jobtracker' directory houses 'JTConfig.java', defining JobTracker configuration parameters like IPC address and memory limits, adhering to separation of concerns. The 'server/tasktracker' directory contains 'TTConfig.java', providing TaskTracker configuration constants such as TT_INDEX_CACHE and TT_MAP_SLOTS, also following the principle of isolated configuration settings. Both directories employ a simple configuration interface pattern, ensuring consistent and manageable system-wide settings for their respective components in Hadoop MapReduce.
